headlines.description: — Dak Prescott and the Dallas Cowboys had already answered their worst showing of the season when the star quarterback took off on a fourth-down scramble near the goal line.
headlines.shortLinkText: Prescott, Cowboys back on track with 43-3 rout of Falcons

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Tennessee Titans

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans want to stack up wins, not style points.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans' NFL-best winning streak now 6, edge Saints 23-21

headlines.description: — Jonathan Taylor's gashing runs and a blocked punt helped the Indianapolis Colts open with a flourish Sunday. Then their defense held tight for the final three quarters.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taylor's big day, blocked punt lead Colts past Jaguars 23-17

events.name: Cleveland Browns at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — A month ago, the New England Patriots were 2-4 and appeared headed for a second straight season of irrelevance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones tosses 3 TDs, Mayfield hurt as Pats beat Browns 45-7

events.name: Buffalo Bills at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills heard it all after an embarrassing loss last week to Jacksonville.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen, Bills D dominate White, Jets in 45-17 rout

headlines.description: — Detroit's long losing streak is over. The threat of a winless season still remains.
headlines.shortLinkText: Comedy of errors as Steelers, Lions slog to 16-16 tie

headlines.description: — An exasperated Tom Brady put his hands on his knees and looked down at the field after his second interception in the first quarter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady picked off twice in 1st; Bucs lose to Washington 29-19

headlines.description: — Cam Newton took the snap on third down and it was like he'd never left the Carolina Panthers. The quarterback got moving in a hurry in his blue, black and silver jersey, barreled into the end zone for a 2-yard touchdown, ripped off his helmet and...
headlines.shortLinkText: Superman's sequel: Newton leads Panthers over Cards 34-10

events.name: Minnesota Vikings at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Mike Zimmer said earlier in the week that his Minnesota Vikings still had plenty of fight. On Sunday they proved it, and possibly put their season back on track.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins throws 2 TDs, Vikings bounce back to beat Chargers

headlines.description: — Cornerback Darius Slay seized both the loose football and the moment.
headlines.shortLinkText: Slay's scoop-and-score leads Eagles past Broncos 30-13

events.name: Seattle Seahawks at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers was back under center and the Packers got back to winning — a welcome return to normal for Green Bay after a tumultuous couple of weeks.
headlines.shortLinkText: Packers blank Seahawks 17-0 as Rodgers, Wilson return

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes scrambled away from pressure as he ran toward the line of scrimmage and launched a deep ball that turned a seemingly broken play into a touchdown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes' 5 TD passes lead Chiefs past Raiders 41-14
